title: Paul Celer
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Paul Celer''' is an English journalist who wrote the backstory of [[Grizz Frix/Legends|Grizz Frix]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is Kast Morben on [[StarWars.com]], and [[User:KastMorben|KastMorben]] on [[Wookieepedia]].
